crime.value: Murder by stabbing with glass - Luke killed during attack on Abby
crime.quote: He killed Luke... he was stabbed with glass. There were a few small shards I was able to find inside his wound

victim.value: Luke Bulkski, young man dating Abby who was killed during attack
victim.quote: Luke Bulkski. He looks peaceful with his eyes closed... He looks young, too young to die

closed_world.value: Small Virginia town of Cats Bridge with sheriff's department
closed_world.quote: The entire police department of our small Virginia town knows me

investigator.value: Sheriff's department officer who knows Abby and is investigating the case
investigator.quote: I look at the inside of the sheriff's department building... Pete and Tracy continue to question the group

suspect_architecture.value: Limited suspect pool with unclear differentiation - mysterious 'he' perpetrator mentioned by victim, plus romantic rivals Josiah and unnamed narrator competing for Abby's attention
suspect_architecture.quote: My mind stays on edge, waiting for anyone to mention the him that Abby told me about in the hospital.

red_herring.value: The mysterious 'he' that Abby was certain committed the crime but whom no one else mentions during questioning
red_herring.quote: Abby appeared so sure that he was the one who did it. Maybe I was wrong.

clue_fairness.value: Glass shards found in Luke's wounds, impulsive rather than premeditated attack suggested by lack of brought weapon
clue_fairness.quote: he was stabbed with glass. There were a few small shards I was able to find inside his wound

social_world.value: Small Virginia town where police department knows everyone personally, informal social networks based on dating history and friendships
social_world.quote: The entire police department of our small Virginia town knows me because I once dated one of their own.

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical evidence analysis through medical examiner's autopsy findings and crime scene investigation
reveal_mechanic.quote: Maybe Pete will find the piece he used as his weapon. Whoever attacked them, he has to be sloppy

investigator_wound.value: Narrator's romantic jealousy and previous relationship with victim Abby creating emotional conflict with professional duty
investigator_wound.quote: Two guys, Sal. I think I'm driving myself crazy with jealousy. She won't let me protect her.
